summary: Tested Serial Number Based Dispatch for Manufactured Items. All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend serial number selector works correctly. Fixed a bug in SKU lookup endpoint that wasn't counting manufactured item stock from finished_good_serials collection.
seed_data_creation: Used existing imported data: 689 production requests, 56 in_stock serial numbers, 688 supervisor payables. Updated 9 Master SKUs to have product_type='manufactured'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Serial number based dispatch is fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: GET /api/finished-good-serials/available/{master_sku_id}, POST /api/dispatches with serial_number. Frontend dispatch form shows serial number selector when manufactured item is selected. Fixed bug in /api/master-skus/lookup and /api/master-skus/search-for-dispatch to count manufactured item stock from finished_good_serials collection instead of inventory_ledger.

available_serials_endpoint.GET /api/finished-good-serials/available: PASSED - Returns in_stock serials for firm

dispatch_with_serial.success_with_serial: PASSED - Creates dispatch and marks serial as dispatched

sku_lookup.GET /api/master-skus/lookup: PASSED - Returns product_type and stock info

features: SKU code lookup with search button
SKU lookup shows stock available for manufactured items
Serial Number Selection section appears for manufactured items
Serial number dropdown with available serials
Serial number is mandatory for manufactured items

bugs_fixed.issue: Was checking inventory_ledger for manufactured item stock instead of finished_good_serials
bugs_fixed.fix: Added condition to count in_stock serials from finished_good_serials for product_type='manufactured' items

bugs_fixed.issue: Same issue - checking wrong collection for manufactured item stock
bugs_fixed.fix: Added same condition to count from finished_good_serials for manufactured items
